arts.ttl: When is Leipzig - Liverpool? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: RB Leipzig has had a mixed run, with wins over Mainz 2-0 and Heidenheim 1-0, but a loss to Juventus 2-3. Liverpool has been in excellent form, securing victories against Crystal Palace 1-0, Wolverhampton Wanderers 2-1, and AFC Bournemouth 3-0.

arts.ttl: We simulated Liverpool vs Chelsea to get a score prediction for Premier League clash
arts.sum: We predict that Liverpool could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Kelleher, Alexander-Arnold, Konate, Van Dijk, Robertson; Gravenberch, Mac Allister, Szoboszlai; Salah, Jota, Diaz. Chelsea will be looking to continue their strong start to the season when they make the tough trip to Anfield to face Liverpool later today.

arts.ttl: I joined Liverpool from Chelsea – I was wrecked and shouldn't have moved
